panels.description: Gateful cache hit ratio; idle cache shows 0 instead of no data.

panels.title: Indexer Scrape Status
panels.description: Indexer OTel and Ponder scrape status.

targets.expr: label_replace(histogram_quantile(0.99, sum(rate(http_server_request_duration_seconds_bucket{job=~"anticapture-${dao:regex}-api"}[$__rate_interval])) by (le, job, http_route)) and sum(rate(http_server_request_duration_seconds_count{job=~"anticapture-${dao:regex}-api"}[$__rate_interval])) by (job, http_route) > 0, "dao", "$1", "job", "anticapture-(.*)-api")

label_replace(((sum(rate(http_server_request_duration_seconds_count{job=~"anticapture-${dao:regex}-api",http_response_status_code=~"5.."}[$__rate_interval])) by (job, http_route) or sum(rate(http_server_request_duration_seconds_count{job=~"anticapture-${dao:regex}-api"}[$__rate_interval])) by (job, http_route) * 0) / sum(rate(http_server_request_duration_seconds_count{job=~"anticapture-${dao:regex}-api"}[$__rate_interval])) by (job, http_route)) and sum(rate(http_server_request_duration_seconds_count{job=~"anticapture-${dao:regex}-api"}[$__rate_interval])) by (job, http_route) > 0, "dao", "$1", "job", "anticapture-(.*)-api")
